Launching your list – Web Analytics Resources
Web Analytics Resources
Here are a few tools and resources to help you get started with tracking and analyzing
your list building results.
 Google Analytics – The best free web analytics tool on the web.
o Core features - http://www.google.com/analytics/features.html
 Google Content Experiments – Ideal for testing the performance of multiple
landing pages.
 Google URL Builder – Enables you to create unique links that you can track
with Google Analytics.
 Google Webmaster Tools - Awesome resource for evaluating the number of
website visitors originating from Google keyword searches. It also provides
valuable data on the specific websites that are linking back to yours.
 Website Analytics Terminology – Here is a quick Google guide on some of
the key metrics to know when using Google Analytics.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
